programme.title: The Office: The Search

programme.title: The Office: PDA

programme.title: The Office: Threat Level Midnight
programme.desc: Michael is finally ready to present his long-awaited action movie 'Threat Level Midnight,' to his co-workers and his love interest.

programme.title: The Office: Todd Packer
programme.desc: Todd Packer is ready to stop being a travelling salesman and takes a desk job in the office. Andy fights Pam for a new computer after his keeps freezing.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: We Don't Need Another Hero
programme.desc: Jane is honoured as a hero at a public event but the celebration is short-lived when disaster strikes. The ensuing case reunites Jane with an old high school flame who may be the person she needs to help her heal emotionally.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Living Proof
programme.desc: Jane and Maura's relaxing day at an outdoor spa is anything but when they discover the murder of a pregnant woman serving as a surrogate mother. Soon the hunt is on the find the baby's biological parents.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Sailor Man
programme.desc: Shortly after sailors invade the streets of Boston for Fleet Week a young girl is found dead. Frost's father, a Navy Admiral, comes to town, causing tension with his son. Maura goes on a date with Angela's mechanic.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Brown Eyed Girl
programme.desc: When the daughter of a police officer is kidnapped, Jane and the team race to find her, fearing the abduction is connected to another case where a young girl turned up dead only hours earlier.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Don't Hate the Player
programme.desc: Jane and Maura investigate after the coach of the Boston Pilgrims baseball team is found dead in the locker room. The death comes as a star player and the team owners battle for control of the team.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Rebel Without a Pause
programme.desc: A Revolutionary War re-enactment becomes the scene of a real killing when a soldier turns up dead. Maura's extensive knowledge of American history becomes important as she and Jane try to solve the case.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Bloodlines
programme.desc: Jane and the team investigate what appears to be a modern-day witch hunt in Salem. Meanwhile, Frankie's old girlfriend returns to town with a surprise and Jane has no problem speaking her mind about the problem.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: My Own Worst Enemy
programme.desc: Jane and Maura delve into a family's background when a man is killed in what appears to be a mugging gone wrong. Meanwhile, a romantic and mysterious figure from Maura's past shows up, causing a rift when Jane suspects Maura is hiding something.

programme.title: Life Today With James and Betty Robison
programme.desc: Life Outreach International encourages the support of missions and relief programs around the world.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world's leading practical Bible teachers and New York Times best-selling author, shares encouragement and advice to help us enjoy our daily lives.

programme.title: Military Makeover: Operation Career
programme.desc: We're exploring leading companies who are changing the careers and lives of military veterans across the country.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Band-Aid Covers the Bullet Hole
programme.desc: While Derek and Addison attempt to come to terms with their relationship, Cristina's day takes a turn for the worse when Bailey instructs her to take care of her baby. Meanwhile, Denny continues to be an obstacle in Alex's attempt to get closer to Izzie.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Superstition
programme.desc: When a series of deaths occur at Seattle Grace, Izzie becomes very nervous about Denny's surgery. Meanwhile, Derek and Addison discuss making a more permanent living arrangement, and Richard treats a very special old friend.

programme.title: The Closer: Home Wrecker
programme.desc: Budget cuts force Brenda to either give one of her team members to the counterterrorism unit or make Provenza retire early. The team investigates the murder of a family whose surviving son is the main suspect.

programme.title: The Closer: Grave Doubts
programme.desc: The body of a long-missing, young gang member is found.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Chain Reaction
programme.desc: Santa finds himself on the naughty list after robbing a bank, but a Santa flash mob complicates his apprehension and the Major Crimes unit scrambles to figure out how things went so wrong. Sharon's kids come to town for the holidays.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Leap of Faith
programme.desc: Tensions are high when Flynn has to talk down a man precariously holding on to the ledge of a bridge, only to find out that the jumper is a sex offender with a dead body in his car. Old wounds are opened as Rusty prepares an impact statement.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Internal Affairs
programme.desc: Sanchez is put under the microscope when his mother's caregiver is found murdered. Rusty is forced to take on Jack when he shows up at Sharon's condo acting recklessly.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Gone Daddy Gone
programme.desc: When a young, female dockworker is found dead, the team discovers that the dock has mob connections that may lead to Maura's biological father. Meanwhile, Jane tries to evade sensitivity training and Maura starts spending time with Jane's brother.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Lovers: Burning Betrayal
programme.desc: When Mary Ann Langley finds her husband James nearly burned to death in their home, investigators must race to determine if it was an accident or assault before they lose him.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Lovers: In Cold Blood
programme.desc: Sandee Rozzo is preparing to face her attacker at court when she’s gunned down in her garage. The culprit seems obvious, but as detectives dig deeper, they learn nothing about this case is cut and dry.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Lovers: Lethal Lover
programme.desc: When police respond to a harrowing 9-1-1 call from a man pleading for his life, they are led on the trail of a revenge plot more disturbing than the young victim’s worst nightmare.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Millionaires: Trust Fund Terror
programme.desc: The brutal slaying of a Fresno family leaves one heir to the family fortune and investigators searching for answers.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Millionaires: Wealthy Widow
programme.desc: A widow's tears after her husband's roadside murder on the Ohio Turnpike help investigators uncover secret drug addictions and illicit affairs.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Last Dance
programme.desc: Evidence tells investigators that a woman was thrown over the side of a bridge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Constructive Critcism
programme.desc: When a man is found dead, having been stabbed 46 times, and police are stuck sifting through the DNA. After an arduous search, they find their killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: 'The Tracey Frame Case' - after a passer-by spots a wild fire in a secluded parking lot, police discover a dreadful homicide. It takes days to identify the victim, and most of the evidence is lost when firefighters extinguish the blaze.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Office Visit
programme.desc: "The Dr. Brian Stidham Case" A prominent Arizona surgeon is found stabbed to death outside his office. All signs point to a random attack until investigators uncover an unlikely suspect with deep pockets, and an even deeper hatred for the good doctor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pet Rock
programme.desc: 'The Denise O'Neill Case' - a quiet waitress vanishes without a trace. Police suspect a case of a date gone horribly wrong. However, when her body is discovered, it comes wrapped in a mountain of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Best Foot Forward
programme.desc: A young woman goes missing, but will anyone notice? A business tycoon caught in a scandal he works over-time not to expose.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fired Up
programme.desc: When a woman's charred remains are found in the rubble of a burned house, investigators have to determine if it is an unfortunate accident, or arson and murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Two in a Million
programme.desc: A millionaire and his family are executed in their own home. For three years the murders went unsolved, until a 30-year-old box of bullets and some iridescent fibers revealed the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Brew
programme.desc: When the head of the Coors Brewing Company is kidnapped and held for ransom, it kicked off one of the most intense manhunts in American history. See how forensic science helped track down the kidnappers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Message in a Bottle
programme.desc: When an attractive young Missouri woman is found dead in her apartment, police meticulously generate a suspect list a mile long. The culprit turns out to be the most unlikely suspect with an insatiable lust for power and control.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seedy Intentions
programme.desc: When a nine-year-old girl goes missing, police and volunteers spend weeks searching for her. A psychic’s vision leads to a field where her body is discovered, along with what investigators hope is enough evidence to help them to also find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: DNA Dragnet
programme.desc: Security camera video shows that what appears to be a casual encounter is actually a forced abduction, leading to murder. The perpetrator’s MO is remarkably similar to another murder which occurred five months earlier only 15 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smiley Face
programme.desc: A woman is assaulted and stabbed nearly 30 times by an unknown assailant. Within days police hone in on a suspect who all but admits to the crime. As the trial approaches, DNA test results stun prosecutors and the suspect is released.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Laundry
programme.desc: A Northern Kentucky businessman is shot to death at his home in front of his wife. Police launch a massive manhunt to find the culprit, but their efforts were futile. A baseball bat and forensic investigation break the case wide open.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Suspect
programme.desc: The wife of a police officer is murdered in her own home. After a decade a newly formed cold case unit took a new look at the case, and using a fragment of a 911 call, they caught the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Hazard
programme.desc: The victim had ingested a massive amount of cyanide. An unlikely clue, a flaw on a mailing envelope, exposed a murderer who was willing to kill innocent people to get the one person he wanted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shell Game
programme.desc: A tiny clue, no bigger than a thumbtack, held all the information investigators needed to put a trio of cold-blooded killers behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ring Him Up
programme.desc: For ten years, the disappearance of a college co-ed was a mystery until new scientific testing cast a different light on a man who had been a suspect all along.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade

programme.title: Forensic Files: Traffic Violations
programme.desc: When a young woman is found dead police immediately focus their attention on her husband. Not until they examine cell phone records and a unique shoe print do they realize the real killer has been a bit too close for comfort the entire time.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherly Love
programme.desc: A young man devotes his life to law enforcement after his sister is brutally murdered. In the end, a brother's love - and a new scientific tool - unlocks the mystery behind an age old case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Disrobed
programme.desc: A married couple was found shot to death in their suburban home. Investigators thought they had pin-pointed the killer and his motive until trash revealed the shocking truth and the true killer's identity.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Driven to Silence
programme.desc: An attractive young hairstylist is murdered in her South Carolina salon, and police are at a loss. A tiny hair and a DNA test force police to take another look nearly a decade after the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Elemental Clue
programme.desc: Police fear a serial killer is on the loose when two women in the same town are murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Moss Not Grass
programme.desc: A young woman is found dead on a golf course in the Bahamas, and the evidence leads police to two suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skirting the Evidence
programme.desc: A woman won $5,000 at the Blackjack table then, three hours later, was kidnapped. A month after that, she was found dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Small Town Terror
programme.desc: Three bombings within a two-mile area were more than a coincidence, but no one claimed responsibility and no one in particular was targeted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sharper Image
programme.desc: After a girl was killed, investigators learn that cutting-edge technologies from NASA prove that the arrested suspect was not the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Insulated Evidence
programme.desc: A young college student is found strangled and badly burned. Investigators get a break when a trace evidence expert uncovers the murder weapon in the spool of a vacuum.

programme.title: BattleBots: Sin City Slasher
programme.desc: Giant Nut runner-up Witch Doctor faces Kraken: both are winless and desperate for victory. Vegas newcomer Jackpot rolls the dice against veteran Ghost Raptor and flipper Hydra has an enormous surprise in store for HUGE.

programme.title: BattleBots: Battle of the Undefeated
programme.desc: Sparks are flying at the midpoint of the season as Valkyrie and Rotator square off in a battle of hard-hitting horizontal spinners. Undefeated bots Malice and MadCatter duke it out and Uppercut takes on bad-bot Sawblaze in an explosive main event.

programme.title: BattleBots: Battle of the Undefeated
programme.desc: Hard-hitting horizontal spinners collide as Valkyrie and Rotator square off. Undefeated bots Malice and MadCatter do battle, then Uppercut challenges Sawblaze in the main event.

programme.title: BattleBots: Turning Up the Heat
programme.desc: Slick-driving Whiplash looks to get its championship aspirations back on track against Gruff's menacing flamethrowers. Underdog Rusty tries attempts to upset veteran Beta, and Hypershock locks horns with Mammoth in a gear-grinding showdown.

programme.title: BattleBots: You Mess With the Bull, You Get the Drum
programme.desc: 2018 finalist Minotaur goes head-to-head with Whiplash as a new group of bots make their debut in the 2019 competition.

programme.title: BattleBots: Turning Up the Heat
programme.desc: Slick-driving Whiplash looks to get its championship aspirations back on track against Gruff's menacing flamethrowers. Underdog Rusty tries attempts to upset veteran Beta, and Hypershock locks horns with Mammoth in a gear-grinding showdown.

programme.title: BattleBots: You Mess With the Bull, You Get the Drum
programme.desc: 2018 finalist Minotaur goes head-to-head with Whiplash as a new group of bots make their debut in the 2019 competition.

programme.title: River Of No Return: Dead Men and Widows
programme.desc: Father and son jetboat captains take on Deadman's Rapids. As a storm bears down, scrambling to re-roof the barn, Pete takes a potentially catastrophic fall. Felling a massive dead tree puts Ron and Wes at risk from widow makers crashing from above.

programme.title: River Of No Return: Hard As Rocks
programme.desc: With dangerous rocks exposed by low water, Buck must hit high speeds to keep his jetboat out of harm's way. Landing solo on a narrow airstrip tests Katie as a pilot. Aubrey plays matchmaker between her reluctant mare and a stud donkey.

programme.title: Gold Rush: No Guts No Glory
programme.desc: Todd, Jack and their crew of unemployed mining greenhorns leave their homes in Oregon with hopes of striking gold and saving their families in southeast Alaska.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Gold, Guns, and Bears
programme.desc: The greenhorn miners are at risk when a mechanical accident threatens to close mining season.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Running Dirt
programme.desc: The crew races to set up the mining plant and start running dirt. When the families arrive from Oregon and question the lack of gold and the men's only mechanic becomes dangerously ill, the tension builds so high Dorsey and Todd come to blows.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Ultimate Price
programme.desc: The team attempts to finally run potential pay dirt through the wash plant, but a visit from the Department of Fish and Game reveals a violation, jeopardizing their vital water supply to the mine.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Pain Barrier
programme.desc: The miners continue to run dirt but an equipment malfunction brings the operation to a halt. James Harness collapses and Jimmy Dorsey drives a wedge between himself and the crew when he takes on an extra job to earn cash.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Gold Fever
programme.desc: After 80 days, the miners are behind schedule and out of money. They need to find $10,000 worth of gold within two days or the families will be sent home. Meanwhile, after Dorsey struggles with the wave table, tensions flare and fists fly.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Going for Broke
programme.desc: With winter weather closing in, a gold recovery expert comes to help the rookies. Todd discovers a major design flaw in the equipment and is forced to make huge modifications.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Bad Blood
programme.desc: The crew remains in deep financial hole. Veteran miner "Dakota" Fred thinks he can turn things around and he cranks up production faster than ever before. But when things start falling apart, tensions mount and Harness can't keep his frustration in.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Bedrock or Bust
programme.desc: Desperate to get to bedrock and large quantities of gold, Todd and Jack throw caution to the wind and dig deeper than ever before. With the brutal Alaskan winter threatening, they battle floods, cave-ins and equipment breakdowns.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Never Say Die
programme.desc: With the arctic winter looming, the crew races against the clock. Rain and thawing snow flood the mine and Jack puts his life on the line as the glory hole caves in around the massive 100,000 pound excavator.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: A Million Excuses
programme.desc: A family of four is on the brink of collapse under the weight of a mother and father's incessant hoarding.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Is That a Goat?
programme.desc: Retired U.S. Marine, Donny, has been to jail twice because of his hoard. Joyce sees comfort in her doll collection, but others see a creepy obsession.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: A VCR for Every Day of the Week
programme.desc: John and Joe are a father and son duo who both hoard. John faces jail time for his compulsions, while Joe could lose his newborn son to child protective services if they don't clean up their mess.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: The Stench Is Amazing
programme.desc: If Tim doesn't grow up and get his home cleaned before his inheritance runs out, he'll lose the house and end up out on the street. A similar fate is in store for twin brothers Lorrin and Orin if their decades-long compulsion can't be curbed.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Worse Than a Haunted House
programme.desc: One mother's battle with hoarding is overshadowed by the discovery of her own daughter's compulsion to hold on to things, while another mother is putting her family's unity on the line and her husband's life at risk with her own extreme hoarding problem.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: How Do I Get Out of This
programme.desc: Linda's hoarding escalated when her marriage began deteriorating. Now, her entire family is on the brink of collapse.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: It's a Rat's Nest
programme.desc: Doug must get a handle on his hoarding problem or he risks losing both of his houses.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: It's a Horror Story
programme.desc: When Frank asked his girlfriend to move in, he wasn't expecting her to fill his house with clutter.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Worse Than a Haunted House
programme.desc: One mother's battle with hoarding is overshadowed by the discovery of her own daughter's compulsion to hold on to things, while another mother is putting her family's unity on the line and her husband's life at risk with her own extreme hoarding problem.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: It's a Rat's Nest

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: It's a Horror Story
programme.desc: When Frank asked his girlfriend to move in, he wasn't expecting her to fill his house with clutter.

programme.title: Sister Wives: Sister Wife Secrets
programme.desc: Meri finds a way to buy the Bed & Breakfast she wants, without the help of her family. The family soon finds out about the big purchase, not from Meri herself, but from a stranger on the street.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Til Dress Do Us Part
programme.desc: After losing 100 pounds, Stephanie wants to show off her new curves in a sexy wedding dress. Christine is looking for a traditional white gown to wear for her vow renewal ceremony. In for her fitting, Akisha is worried her dress won't impress her fiancé.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Chart Topping Dress
programme.desc: Country star Whitney Duncan needs a dress that, like her, commands centre stage. Rock girl Chic wants a gown that is hot, sexy and beautiful. Songwriter Kiirsten is nervous for her fitting, but should be more worried about her veil.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Designer Dreams
programme.desc: Liz is in the salon with Danielle Jonas, and wants to show off her new body. Courtney Cason said yes to Mark Zunino's sketch, but now it's time to try on the real gown. Jillian wants a fashion forward dress but her mom isn't making it easy.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Situation in the Salon
programme.desc: Mike 'The Situation' Sorrentino arrives at Kleinfeld to help younger sister Melissa find her wedding gown, but he and his brothers keep stealing her spotlight. Meanwhile, bride-to-be Ashley is upstaged by her flower girl's custom-made Pnina dress.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons: Did Somebody Shrink You?
programme.desc: Trent and Amber surprise Emma and Alex with a go kart so that they can practice driving. Meanwhile, Elizabeth is making big strides in her nursing career, but she is not happy to see her younger siblings behind the wheel before she has her own license.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons: Are You Gonna Marry Liz?
programme.desc: Liz's best little people friends, Carol and Dacey, come to town for a visit and have a lot of questions for her boyfriend, Brice. Despite a lack of social media skills, Trent tries to join in on the success of his kids' online shops.

programme.title: I'm Pregnant And ...: Have An Eating Disorder

programme.title: I'm Pregnant And ...: Bi-Polar
programme.desc: Jolene had to choose between taking the psychiatric drugs that control her bi-polar disorder, and safeguarding the health of her unborn child.

programme.title: I'm Pregnant And ...: Homeless
programme.desc: Misty and Jonathan lost their home after Misty became pregnant. Now, the couple lives in a tent and struggle to find jobs and housing before the baby is born, or they risk losing custody of him.

programme.title: I'm Pregnant And ...: Have OCD
programme.desc: Jenna's life is dominated by her OCD, with her second child on the way; she struggles with a condition that dictates her marriage and young son's life.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Homeless Man With a House

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Penny's Story
programme.desc: Bedridden for four years, 46-year-old Penny knows that her weight may kill her if drastic actions aren't taken. Penny moves from Maryland to Texas to have gastric bypass, but her unwillingness to make real lifestyle changes could be her downfall.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Nikki's Story
programme.desc: Lifelong secret eater Nikki finds her life and career as a costume designer threatened by immobility as her weight climbs to 650 pounds. In urgent need of drastic weight loss, she undergoes gastric bypass and confronts the emotional causes for her eating.

programme.title: Movie: The Karate Kid

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: The Text

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: Attack of the Killer Raccoons

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Drum and Drummer

programme.desc: The parts of Out of Remote Control that annoyed people more than any challenge to date. Why the crew was emotionally scarred after Debate and Switch.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: The guys try not to crack up during a four-way face off and later find that a stroll with the Gatto pups is no walk in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser suffers more than muscle failure in a major league embarrassment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hell on Wheels

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crash Test Dummies

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr get tech help from some confused tutors, then play hot potato in a shoe store. Plus, the big loser wishes he could press 'escape' during a brutal coffee shop punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q pull desk duty, and then do strangers a solid by barring them from the bathroom. Plus, the big loser learns the hard way that gratuity is not included.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dumbbell
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr test their parental instincts by reading their daughters' diaries, then give presentations that are anything but normal. Later, tonight's big loser gets painfully honest with bodybuilders at the gym.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Blue Man Dupe

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fraudway

programme.title: Ice Cold Gold: The Gold Rush
programme.desc: Forced to leave their precious Ruby deposit before Greenland devours them, the miners execute phase two of their operation within the few weeks they have left.

programme.title: Ice Cold Gold: Point of No Return
programme.desc: The miners are almost at season's end. With winter closing in and time running out, Josh and Eric arrive in Eqi for one last shot at gold. Meanwhile, the rest of the team focuses on dredging for rubies.

programme.title: Ice Cold Gold: Beast Within
programme.desc: It's the miner's last week, and Greenland has not only gotten in their heads but she is exposing their inner demons. With only days left before she covers her gifts up for the winter, The Beast reveals the chinks in their resolve.

programme.title: Ice Cold Gold: Facing the Beast
programme.desc: Greenland's a veritable beast, but the motley crew of ice cold gold miners is up for the challenge. Each thinks he has what it takes to walk away with gold, rubies and sapphires before winter and large mining companies swoop in.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Miracle on the Mountain
programme.desc: Todd Hoffman takes the biggest gamble and turns his back on guaranteed gold in the Klondike. Tony Beets expands his empire, buying a huge second dredge. Parker Schnabel starts his new season without his grandfather and mentor.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Eye in the Sky
programme.desc: Todd Hoffman has his back against the wall when his new Oregon mine fails to deliver. Parker Schnabel's new $600,000 washplant breaks down on its first start-up and Tony Beets takes to the sky to check up on his children.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Frankenstein Machinery
programme.desc: Todd returns to the Klondike to collect Monster Red while Parker confronts tough negotiator Tony over royalties and receives a shock offer which will change his season.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Kitten Dolls
programme.desc: Three litters of kittens grow from helpless furballs to rambunctious young kittens in this epic story.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Katrina Storms In
programme.desc: Jackson dives deep into the world of a Los Angeles feral colony where he and his team of trappers must make order out of a world of wild cat-crawling chaos. Then, Jackson visits a family too afraid to furnish their house because of their cat's spraying.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Robert, King of Cobras
programme.desc: Robert follows in Steve's steps wrangling Utah, a highly venomous 12-foot king cobra. Dr. Amber visits Tandora to care for wild Koalas. Back at the Zoo, an old injury flares up for Bruce the Brolga, a bird who's been in the Irwin's care for 26 years.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Save the Elephants
programme.desc: An elephant family has a potentially deadly virus affecting animals in captivity and in the wild. With the youngest members of the family most at risk, the keepers and the zoo's veterinary team must do all they can to combat the mysterious illness.

programme.title: The Zoo: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: The birth of a little blue penguin becomes causes a sensation at the Bronx Zoo. The veterinary team scrambles to figure out what is wrong with Snowball, a snow leopard. And the exhibits team designs an exhibit for the newly arrived blue iguana.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Sky High Spa
programme.desc: An entrepreneur from Austin, Texas hires Pete to a spa treehouse on her ranch. Pete faces plumbing challenges and builds an extravagant spa with a steam shower and a Japanese soaking tub.

programme.title: Tanked!: Fermenting Donuts
programme.desc: Wayde and Brett dive into a brand new undertaking transporting a fully operational beer fermenter. The guys head south to create an iconic donut-shaped tank inspired by the renowned Dunkin' Donuts.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Can't Give Up
programme.desc: When a dog finally gets a chance at being adopted, the Villalobos team has to drive all the way to Michigan for the home check. Their journey is disrupted when a plea for help sends Tia chasing after a dog that has been living on the streets for 2 years.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Collision Course
programme.desc: A dangerous rescue mission is launched to secure two dogs spotted running wild on the train tracks next to the rescue center.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Mayday Mayday
programme.desc: Texas Game Wardens investigate a Jet Ski accident that sends an injured man to the hospital. The Wardens must track down a hunter shooting doves in a residential neighbourhood. On Lake Lewisville, Wardens deal with a partier who's had too much to drink.

programme.title: Movie: Madea's Big Happy Family
programme.desc: When her three grown-up children fail to answer her call for a family gathering, exacerbated mother Shirley calls on outspoken force of nature Madea to see that everyone comes together to discuss some rather important issues.

programme.title: Movie: House Party
programme.desc: Despite his father's wishes, an urban teenager schemes to attend his friend's party.

programme.title: Movie: Meet the Browns
programme.desc: After years of trying to make ends meet, a single mother of three finds out that the father she's never known has passed away. She decides to go to the funeral in hopes of getting to know a part of her family she never knew existed.

programme.title: Kevin Hart: Let Me Explain

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Aliens and Lost Worlds
programme.desc: Mysterious legends and crumbling ruins are all that is left of our planet's lost worlds.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Aliens B.C.
programme.desc: Modern archaeologists are continuously unearthing artefacts and sites that defy the conventional timeline of human history.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Other Earth
programme.desc: Billions of dollars have been spent in our quest to find an 'other Earth.' Since the launch of the Kepler Telescope in 2009, scientists have identified thousands of planets capable of supporting life. This could support that theory that we aren't alone.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Creatures of the Deep
programme.desc: While many discount stories of sea monsters as purely mythological, it is estimated that Earth's oceans are home to between 700,000 to one million species. Shockingly, two-thirds of those species still remain unknown.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Voices of the Gods
programme.desc: India's Sanskrit texts are filled with incredible stories about advanced technology in the ancient world.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Alien Protocols
programme.desc: In 2017, a strange, cigar-shaped object entered our solar system from another star system traveling in such an unusual trajectory it caused some astronomers to suggest that it could be an extraterrestrial craft.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Sentinels
programme.desc: Seven stone giants stand guard over a Pacific island, but no one knows what they are protecting. Later, Girogio and David explore a Polynesian land of bizarre figures and forbidden places in search of evidence of mankind's extraterrestrial origins.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: They Came From the Sky
programme.desc: Ancient cultures from around the world believed that meteorites were not merely rocks that fell from the sky, but sacred stones imbued with the power of the Gods.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Secrets of Stonehenge
programme.desc: A shocking DNA study released in 2018 reveals that the original builders of Stonehenge mysteriously vanished. Experts discuss if Stonehenge's mysterious 'bluestone circle' could have activated a portal that transported the culture back to the stars.

programme.title: Movie: Speak Easily

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Shadow
programme.desc: The save the date cards had gone out. Angie Ver Huel went to sleep next to her fiancé, Justin Michael, with big dreams but woke up to a nightmare. Someone was running from their bedroom and Justin was dead.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Ultimatum
programme.desc: Michele and Lloyd Neurauter were devoted to their three daughters, even after divorce. When Michele was found dead in her home, police suspected suicide. Then, they uncovered a deadly betrayal too twisted to be true. Except that it was.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Mystery in South Beach
programme.desc: Wendy Trapaga was a beaming young bride. Then, just four days after saying 'I do' she was found dead in a parking lot. Investigators discovered the newlyweds were keeping secrets. There was also someone else with a secret and it was combustible.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Twisted Betrayal
programme.desc: When a devoted mother with a bright future in show business is ruthlessly gunned down, a number of suspects emerge, but just as detectives think they have the killer in their sights, the investigation takes a jaw dropping turn.

programme.desc: Two teen runaways become ensnared in a homicide investigation when someone who disapproved of their relationship is discovered murdered.

programme.desc: A deeply religious woman and her bible-study partner become the primary suspects in an execution-style murder.

programme.desc: A married couple is suspected of foul play when a beloved school teacher goes missing.

programme.desc: Two desperate, young lovers lead investigators on a cross-country manhunt full of murder and mayhem. Now hear directly from one of the suspects in an exclusive interview.

programme.desc: The discovery of a dead body casts suspicion on an unlikely high school romance.

programme.title: Snapped: Jennifer Morrisey

programme.title: Snapped: Stephanie Olson

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lisa's First Word

programme.title: Mom: Chicken Nuggets and a Triple Homicide
programme.desc: In order to get the family back together, Christy and Bonnie rent a house with a colourful past. Meanwhile, Bonnie tries to broker peace between Christy and Alvin.

programme.title: Mom: Forged Resumes and the Recommended Dosage
programme.desc: While Christy tries to get to the bottom of Violet's erratic behaviour, Bonnie attempts to get a job.

programme.title: Mom: Kimchi and a Monkey Playing Harmonica
programme.desc: Christy has mixed feelings about Baxter's new relationship with Candace. Meanwhile, things between Bonnie and Alvin heat up.

programme.title: Mom: Crazy Eyes and a Wet Brad Pitt

programme.title: Black-ish: Super Rich Kids
programme.desc: Dre has always felt his older son was never like him, but when he finally meets Junior's cool friends, Dre is all in and happy that his son may have the opportunity for an actual social life.

programme.title: Movie: The Peanuts Movie
programme.desc: While Snoopy and his crew take to the skies to hunt for the Red Baron, Charlie Brown stresses about how to make a good impression on the new girl in town.

programme.title: Movie: Ice Age: Collision Course
programme.desc: When Scrat accidentally sets of a chain of events that cause a meteor storm to head toward Earth, it is up to the old gang to save the planet. Sid, Manny, and Diego go on an epic adventure to find clues to stop the meteor and save the world.

programme.title: Movie: Angry Birds
programme.desc: An island of happy, flightless birds is visited by a ship of mysterious green pigs, led by Leonard. Red, a bird with anger problems, doesn't trust them, but he is ignored. When their eggs go missing, it is up to Red and his friends to get them back.

programme.title: Life: Creatures of the Deep
programme.desc: A journey into the uncharted corners of the ocean where the newest discoveries are being made and where the strangest sea creatures can be found.

programme.title: Life: Plants
programme.desc: Enter the world of plants as time-lapse technology makes this violent and self-seeking organism's behaviour a truly dynamic and surprisingly emotional experience.

programme.title: Planet Earth: From Pole to Pole
programme.desc: The ultimate portrait of our planet looks at the key factors that shape our natural history. In the Arctic spring, a mother polar bear and cubs have two weeks to cross the frozen sea. Time-lapse cameras capture the transformation created by floods.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Mountains
programme.desc: A tour of the mountain ranges reveals how animals rise to the challenge of mountain life. The snow leopard finds habitat in the largest glaciers of the world.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Fresh Water
programme.desc: Follow the descent of rivers from their mountain sources to the sea. Witness unique and dramatic moments of animal behaviour, including a piranha frenzy and a showdown between otters and crocodiles.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Caves
programme.desc: Although often overlooked, caves are remarkable habitats with equally bizarre wildlife. This documentary provides a unique access to a hidden world of stalactites, stalagmites, snotites and troglodytes that brings a wealth of surprises.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Deserts
programme.desc: Deserts cover one fifth of the planet and they are spreading every year. We think we are familiar with the Sahara and the Kalahari but what about the Gobi or the Atacama -so many deserts have hardly been explored.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Ice Worlds
programme.desc: The Arctic and Antarctic experience the most extreme seasons on Earth. Time-lapse cameras watch a colony of penguins, while aerial images show a polar bear swimming more than 100 km.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Great Plains
programme.desc: After filming for three years, the shy Mongolian gazelle and the bizarre-looking Tibetan fox are captured on film. Over six weeks, the team follows a pride of 30 lions as they attempt to hunt elephants.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Jungles
programme.desc: Jungles cover roughly three per cent of our planet yet contain 50 per cent of the world's species. In the Ngogo forest, the largest chimpanzee group defends its territory from neighbouring groups. Other specialists include a parasitic fungi.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Shallow Seas
programme.desc: A humpback whale mother and calf embark on a journey from tropical coral paradises to storm-ravaged polar seas. Indonesian coral reefs reveal seahorses, clams and sea kraits. Bull fur seals attack king penguins, and sea urchins fell forests of kelp.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Seasonal Forests
programme.desc: From the evergreen forests of the frozen north to the deciduous dry forests of the Equator, discover the greatest woodlands on Earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Ocean Deep
programme.desc: In the ocean, life goes to extraordinary lengths to survive this immense realm. A 30-tonne whale shark gorges on a school of fish. Deep sea octopus fly in the abyss and vampire squid use bioluminescence to create a colour display.

programme.title: Planet Earth: A Celebration
programme.desc: This program highlights eight of the most extraordinary sequences from 'Planet Earth II' and 'Blue Planet II.' In addition to new narration, the sequences will include an arrangement of original scores from composer Hans Zimmer and Jacob Shea.

programme.desc: When a powerful radio beam originating from deep space is detected by experts on earth, some suspect its hard evidence of extraterrestrial life; new investigations into this shocking signal might reveal the truth.

programme.title: Phantom Signals: Soviet Doomsday Warning
programme.desc: A Russian radio station has broadcast a signal nonstop since the Cold War, and no one knows why; experts use hi-tech methods to investigate what it is, and what might happen if it ever stops.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: House of Horror
programme.desc: An eerie set of buildings in Paris is evidence of an unspeakable evil. New discoveries reveal the horrific things that happened here, and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Arctic Hell Pit
programme.desc: Traces of a Russian hole to hell in the Arctic, a military base in America's Wild West, and a strange looming tower are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Factory of Death
programme.desc: A deserted facility in the remote countryside features mysterious graffiti that may be highly advanced mathematical equations pointing to a dark secret; experts investigate this classified military wasteland with a deadly past.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Ghost of Black Mountain
programme.desc: Ghostly remnants of a beautifully constructed town in the remote backwoods of Kentucky suggests a forgotten tale of utter catastrophe and devastation; experts investigate and uncover the dark and oppressive history of a deadly industrial mining complex.

programme.title: Conspiracies Decoded: Secrets of the Scorpion
programme.desc: A nuclear submarine spying on Soviet maneuvers goes missing and its wreckage is mysteriously found on the ocean floor. The US Navy claims it was an accident, but declassified documents reveal startling new information that points to a Cold War cover up.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: End Times on Lake Michigan
programme.desc: An abandoned industrial complex on the shores of Lake Michigan was once a top-secret military compound that protected America from enemy attacks; new discoveries reveal what really happened here and why the government turned its back on this juggernaut.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Ghost of Black Mountain
programme.desc: Ghostly remnants of a beautifully constructed town in the remote backwoods of Kentucky suggests a forgotten tale of utter catastrophe and devastation; experts investigate and uncover the dark and oppressive history of a deadly industrial mining complex.

programme.desc: A nuclear submarine spying on Soviet maneuvers goes missing and its wreckage is mysteriously found on the ocean floor. The US Navy claims it was an accident, but declassified documents reveal startling new information that points to a Cold War cover up.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: End Times on Lake Michigan
programme.desc: An abandoned industrial complex on the shores of Lake Michigan was once a top-secret military compound that protected America from enemy attacks; new discoveries reveal what really happened here and why the government turned its back on this juggernaut.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Factory of Death
programme.desc: A deserted facility in the remote countryside features mysterious graffiti that may be highly advanced mathematical equations pointing to a dark secret; experts investigate this classified military wasteland with a deadly past.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of the Haunted Prison
programme.desc: A mysterious American pyramid built out of Cold War paranoia, a haunted prison, and a strange cluster of structures in the Atlantic are mysterious deserted engineering projects are investigated.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Underwater Ghost Prison
programme.desc: An entrance to the underworld in the American wild, a haunting Soviet underwater prison, and a strange complex of towers in a forest of ice are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: Iron Man Army
programme.desc: A former CIA operative investigates newly declassified documents that reveal the secrets of a multibillion-dollar mission to build a real-life Iron Man equipped with superhuman strength, cutting-edge weapons, and telepathic abilities.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: Rise of the Nightstalkers
programme.desc: A former CIA operative investigates new evidence of a top-secret group known as the 'Nightstalkers,' a clandestine team of the world's best aviators involved in the assassination of Osama Bin Laden and other dangerous black ops.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: How to Stop an Assassination
programme.desc: Newly declassified document reveal the details of a top-secret government program created in the wake of the Kennedy assassination to go to extreme lengths to protect the president. A former CIA operative exposes the cutting-edge defenses now in place.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: American UFOs
programme.desc: A top-secret aviation program funded by a mysterious money trail could have built a plane that can travel nearly 4,000 miles an hour; a former CIA operative investigates how these superplanes will revolutionize flight and unleash a new lethal technology.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: To Catch an Alien
programme.desc: A top-secret government program might have proof that aliens have visited earth, and a former CIA operative uses newly declassified documents and special access to investigate if the US military already has its hands on advanced, alien technology.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: Secrets of the Space Force
programme.desc: Newly declassified documents reveal that the US Space Force is the culmination of decades of top-secret military programs to weaponize the cosmos, and special access exposes the cutting-edge weapons and sci-fi defense systems behind real-life star wars.

programme.title: Crash Test World: Qatar
programme.desc: Kari ventures to Doha, Qatar, on the Arabian Peninsula to discover how people rely on centuries-old customs and modern technology to grow food, find water and keep cool all while living in the desert.

programme.title: Crash Test World: New York City
programme.desc: With more than half of the world's population in cities, functions like transportation and waste management are a major challenge. Kari visits New York City, where urban planners, developers and kids in the Bronx work to make their city more livable.

programme.title: America's Lost Vikings: Beating Columbus
programme.desc: Expert archaeologists investigate the first confirmed Viking settlement in America, and using cutting-edge technology, they're making new discoveries that will change everything we know about American history.

programme.title: America's Lost Vikings: Mystery of the Sea Raiders
programme.desc: Experts investigate a mysterious set of clues that suggest the Vikings could have ventured deeper into North America, and using cutting-edge tech, they put Viking ships to the test to reveal how far they could have gone.

programme.title: America's Lost Vikings: War in the New World
programme.desc: New evidence reveals that Vikings and Native Americans might have fought a thousand years ago, and using cutting-edge tech, experts put their weaponry and tactics to the test to find out who might have won.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: Night on the Parkway
programme.desc: In the great smoky mountains of North Carolina, Billy Carter raises his daughters Crystal and Misty. When a body is found on the scenic Blue Ridge Parkway, this family's piece of paradise becomes a nightmare they relive again and again.

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: One Hot Summer

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: A Shot in the Dark

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: The Dangers of Success

programme.title: Diabolical: Family or Foe

programme.desc: The Millers always thought something was off with their oldest son Steven. But as he slips from strange into sinister, there's no telling how far Steven will go to get his respected New York family's attention.

programme.title: Fear Thy Roommate: Down the Rabbit Hole
programme.desc: A young woman craving independence moves out of her parents' house and in with her kind-hearted boss. But independence comes with a price, and when she is unable to pay, she loses control and more than one 'innocent' is slaughtered.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Mailbox Madness
programme.desc: When someone new decides to build his dream home on a quiet street, neighbours take sides. Long-time friends become hard-core enemies, and death is just around the corner.

programme.desc: When someone new decides to build his dream home on a quiet street, neighbours take sides. Long-time friends become hard-core enemies, and death is just around the corner.

programme.title: Diabolical: Family or Foe
programme.desc: A young family in La Mirada, CA is out for an evening stroll when terror strikes. For investigation nothing seems to add up. Is it random violence or a mastermind at work? The truth will take years to emerge.

programme.title: Cold Hearted: Reputations Matter
programme.desc: Rebecca Simpson lives a picturesque, luxurious life with everything she could ever want. Yearning for more excitement, she begins an affair that ultimately puts her life in a downward spiral filled with jealousy, obsession and a thirst for murder.

programme.title: Cold Hearted: Collateral Damage
programme.desc: James is a Marine living the American dream. His duty often takes him away from home, but he still provides for his family. While away his wife seeks companionship closer to home. A sordid affair culminates in an explosive revelation.

programme.title: Dangerous Persuasions: The Power of Hate
programme.desc: Angela King is a troubled teenager who falls in with the wrong crowd. She becomes a white supremacist preaching hate and inflicting brutal attacks on innocent victims. It's only when she is sent to prison for armed robbery that she can find redemption.

programme.title: Dangerous Persuasions: Highway to Hate
programme.desc: Kerry Noble took his pregnant wife to a Christian commune, where he was led into a world of racism and mass-murder.

programme.title: Deadly Deception: Life Has No Fairytales
programme.desc: Desperate to escape her chaotic life, a Colorado woman reunites with her high school sweatheart in Florida, but the consequences of this decision will be fatal.

programme.title: Deadly Deception: Wife of Her Dreams
programme.desc: An Atlanta couple seems too good to be true. After they reunite with a stunning high school friend, things begin to take a deadly turn.

programme.title: Murder Among Friends: Murder Party
programme.desc: In Northern California, an anonymous tip leads detectives to a decaying corpse, buried at a mountain campsite. As police investigate their victim's past, they unveil a boisterous life of love, jealousy... and one truly shocking secret.

programme.title: Scorned: Love Kills: Bedside Manner
programme.desc: Stephanie is a former beauty queen and always dreamed of a high end lifestyle. When she is appointed as Dr. Stephens' head nurse, she is quickly charmed by both his charm and bank account and will stop at nothing to get the glamorous life she wants.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Letters in the Closet
programme.desc: Karla leaves her home one night and never returns. The next day, her husband calls the police to file a missing person report. When the police uncover a treasure trove of hidden secrets, they have to decide who is telling the truth and who is lying.

programme.title: Suspicious Minds: Everyone Knows Her Name
programme.desc: After the shocking death of Heather Maples, the student community of Murfreesboro, Tennessee confronts the sobering truth that a killer is lurking among them. Detectives unlock her cell phone to find a web potential suspects and her last steps.

programme.title: Heart of Darkness: Gambling With The Devil
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in her car by her husband and son.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Murder in the Cards
programme.desc: Gary and Helen have two kids, two cars, and a lot of love. When Gary's other love for blackjack becomes more of a habit than a hobby, he and Helen go to extraordinary lengths to recoup losses... leaving one behind bars and the other six feet under.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Pearl Harbor was a day that changed American history and life forever. But was the attack really a surprise? What did FDR know about the attack beforehand? An investigation into who really fired the first shots of the Pacific War?

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Nazi Jewel Heist
programme.desc: When the U.S. military takes over the German Kronberg Castle in 1945, a scandalous affair between a U.S. Army Captain and Air Force Officer ensues, resulting in one of the most elaborate treasure heists of all time.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Bull Run
programme.desc: In what will be the first real battle of the Civil War, untested and poorly trained Rebel and Confederate troops clash on the blood soaked banks of the Bull Run River.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Gettysburg
programme.desc: An elite band of Yankee Sharpshooters must stop Robert E. Lee's Alabamian shock troops from flanking the Union line and winning the battle of Gettysburg and perhaps the entire Civil War.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Antietam
programme.desc: Following a string of victories in Virginia, Confederate military genius General Robert E. Lee brings his army north in a bold attempt to end the Civil War and win Southern Independence.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Fredericksburg
programme.desc: Following the strategic Union win at Antietam, federal forces clash with a massive Rebel army in the town of Fredericksburg, Virginia in what will become the largest fight of the Civil War.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Nashville
programme.desc: In a daring attempt to regain the upper hand in the Civil War, Confederate forces try to retake the city of Nashville and sever the supply line that's feeding the Union invasion of the south.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Petersburg
programme.desc: The Union invasion of the south has ground to a halt at the seemingly impregnable ring of trenches built around Petersburg, Virginia. After eight bloody attempts to storm them have failed, two officers from Vermont will lead a daring raid.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Fredericksburg
programme.desc: Following the strategic Union win at Antietam, federal forces clash with a massive Rebel army in the town of Fredericksburg, Virginia in what will become the largest fight of the Civil War.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Nashville

programme.title: Air Aces: Gabby Gabreski
programme.desc: U.S. Air Force Pilot Francis Gabby Gabreski made it his personal mission to be the best flying ace there ever was.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Sicilian Connection
programme.desc: Incensed by their treatment under Mussolini's regime and anxious to re-establish their European criminal network, a number of mafioso, including incarcerated kingpin Charles 'Lucky' Luciano, offered their full support to American intelligence officers.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Zoot Suit Riots
programme.desc: In pre-war America street gangs were on the rise. California media stirred up panic about young Mexicans and Latinos. When WWII began, racial tensions increased and they were quickly portrayed as a significant threat, leading to a racial boiling point.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Godfather of London
programme.desc: Billy Hill was the most powerful Kingpin in Britain's post-war underworld, but the secret behind Hill's empire is little known.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: In 1941, Hitler has thrown himself into a fight to the death against Stalin. Two decades earlier, in 1917, Joseph Jughashvili from Georgia is a member of Lenin's Bolshevik Party, who has just seized power in Russia. The country is torn by civil war.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: After blocking the Germans right outside of Moscow, Stalin now faces Hitler's second assault. The world's fate will be decided in Stalingrad. Like in Leningrad, men, women, and children are plunged into hell and sacrificed.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: The Soviets continue on the path to towards liberation. On the road to Berlin, they discover the horror of Hitler's extermination camps. Fifteen years earlier, Stalin transformed his country using every means at his disposal.

programme.title: Weaponology: Rangers
programme.desc: US Army Rangers are the men of steel forged in the fire of every major conflict from the beaches of D-Day to the streets of Baghdad. Weaponology takes you through time to show how the Rangers always ride the cutting edge of military technology.

programme.title: Weaponology: Navy Seals
programme.desc: Masters of stealth and lords of destruction, the US Navy SEALs are the most versatile special operations force in the world. See the evolution of their cutting edge weapons and insertion techniques.

programme.title: Weaponology: Rapid Fire
programme.desc: One man, one weapon, lots of bullets. From the cumbersome but deadly Gatling gun to the lightweight, hand-held assassins of the modern battlefield, trace the men and the moments that developed the most deadly family of infantry weapons.

programme.desc: Get ready to pile it on thick as we're talking layers of goodness that are stacked to the ceiling. We take a trip to Chicago where we meet up with Jeff Mauro to discover all the magic colors hidden inside the rainbow cake.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Double Date Danger
programme.desc: When Miss Shapen's niece, Noelle, comes into town and chooses Jasper over Henry, Henry discovers that Noelle has much bigger plans than just going out to dinner with Jasper.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Stealing Home
programme.desc: Hank and Phoebe think the house has been robbed when they return home and discover the furniture missing, but Max admits he hid everything and forces them to earn their belongings back before Barb discovers the truth.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Robin Hood: Prince of Pheebs
programme.desc: When Chloe announces that Max is her favorite sibling, Phoebe tries to show her the 'real' Max by telling a Robin Hood-style bedtime story about the great Phoebe Hood and the evil Maxingham.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Beat the Parents
programme.desc: Nervous about meeting his girlfriend's parents, Max enlists help from Phoebe, whose charms ultimately backfire and leave Max banned from ever seeing his girlfriend again.

programme.title: Danger Force: Mime Games
programme.desc: Bose must try and stop The Toddler from breaking into The Man's Nest when Danger Force and Captain man are called to Paris.

programme.title: Young Dylan: Natural Beauty
programme.desc: Dylan tries to help Charlie with his homework. His unconventional style of doing his homework comes to a head when Dylan gets into a rap battle with the teacher.

programme.title: Danger Force: Mika in the Middle
programme.desc: A surprise from Schowz's mom might cause Mika to fail her test on not snitching.

programme.title: The Loud House: Crimes of Fashion/ Scales of Justice
programme.desc: When Leni gets fired from her job due to missing scarves, Lincoln and Clyde take on the case.

programme.title: The Loud House: Absent Minded/ Be Stella My Heart
programme.desc: Clyde discovers he didn't earn the junior administrator job, but doesn't want to give up the perks that come along with it. When the new girl starts hanging around Lincoln and his friends, they begin to suspect she likes one of them.

programme.title: The Loud House: Sitting Bull/ The Spies Who Loved Me
programme.desc: The older sisters reluctantly let Lynn into their babysitting club. Ronnie Anne wants to go downtown, but her grandparents think it's too dangerous.

programme.title: The Loud House: Really Loud Music
programme.desc: Luna contemplates whether she should go with a song that's true to her sound, or try to make something that the whole world will love just to win a song writing contest.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Mexican Makeover/ Uptown Funk
programme.desc: With Mama Lupe coming to visit, Abuela tries to make sure her family represents their culture perfectly. Adelaide and Carl must work together on an adventure on Mr. Chang's route.

programme.title: The Loud House: House of Lies/ Game Boys
programme.desc: After witnessing an excess of lying in the family, Lisa invents lie-detecting glasses to try and curb the fibs. Lincoln asks to borrow Clyde's new gaming system, but Clyde struggles to trust that it's safe with him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Food Con Castaways/ Snail Mail
programme.desc: The gang heads to a food convention, but things go awry when they become stranded in the woods. Later SpongeBob accidentally fibs to his pen pal, but when his friend comes to visit, he must keep the ruse going!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Fear of a Krabby Patty/ Shell of a Man
programme.desc: SpongeBob develops a fear of Krabby Patties; Mr. Krab molts his shell before a reunion.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: All That Glitters/ Wishing You Well
programme.desc: SpongeBob's spatula breaks mid-patty flip; Mr. Krabs installs a wishing well near the Krusty Krab and sends SpongeBob down the well in a bucket to collect the coins.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Selling Out/ Funny Pants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs sells his restaurant to a big company, but he soon finds retirement boring.

programme.title: It's Pony: Gerry's Birthday/ Haircut
programme.desc: When Annie and Pony try to give Gerry the best birthday ever, their enthusiasm threatens to make it the worst. When Annie needs a haircut, Pony proves that even a simple task can become a wild adventure.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob vs. the Patty Gadget/ Money Talks
programme.desc: SpongeBob competes against a patty-making machine; Mr. Krabs' money tells him to spend it.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Enemy-in-Law/ Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy VI
programme.desc: Krabs is horrified when he learns that the secret paramour dating his mother is Plankton.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Squidward, the Unfriendly Ghost
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick accidentally hit Squidward with a flying shell, thinking they knocked him out. They place what is really a wax replica next to the heater, melting him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krusty Towers/ Mrs. Puff, You're Fired
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs turns the Krusty Krabs into Krusty Towers, an upscale hotel where the customer is king, even the most obnoxious and demanding ones. This pushes Squidward to the point of quitting and returning as a guest to make a series of outrageous requests.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Squidtastic Voyage/ That's No Lady
programme.desc: Spongebob and Patrick shrink and travel inside Squidward's body; Patrick thinks that he must get out of town.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Best Day Ever/ The Gift of Gum
programme.desc: Spongebob is going to have the best day ever, until all of his friends have problems; It's Best Friends Day, so Spongebob and Patrick trade Best Friend presents.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Driven to Tears/ Rule of Dumb
programme.desc: Sponge Bob fails his driver's test again, Pat asks them to prove the test can be passed.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Greasy Buffoons/ Model Sponge
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs and Plankton woo customers with greasy entrees. SpongeBob tries a career at being a model in a kitchen sponge commercial.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Pink Purloiner/ Squid Wood
programme.desc: Rejected by Squidward, SpongeBob decides to make his own Squid ventriloquist dummy.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob's Place/ Plankton Gets the Boot
programme.desc: When SpongeBob cooks at home, Mr. Krabs' customers leave his restaurant and head for SpongeBob's Place.When Plankton gets kicked out of the house, it's up to SpongeBob to teach him how to win his computer wife back.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Back to School/ Bromance
programme.desc: When Dave discovers he didn't graduate from high school, he finds himself in school with Alvin. Simon has found a new best friend, Jamie. But when Jamie realizes that Alvin is the more popular brother, he ditches Simon.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Theozilla/ Doggone It
programme.desc: When Alvin is paired with Simon for a Science project, he accidentally creates a potion that turns Theodore into a 30-foot giant. Later, when all the phones at school are missing, Alvin is blamed and he tries to clear his name.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Sister Act/ Lil' T
programme.desc: Following a fight with Brittany, Eleanor decides to move in with Alvin and his brothers. When his brothers won't listen to Theodore's song, he posts a video of himself rapping on the Internet and it becomes a mega-hit.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Mission Responsible/ Hair-I-Cane
programme.desc: Cosmo and Wanda are exhausted, so Timmy volunteers to baby-sit and give them a night out. Timmy's tired of getting really bad haircuts from Dad.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Cosmonopoly/ Hero Hound
programme.desc: Timmy, his dad, and fairies get stuck in a board game created by Cosmo. Timmy wishes Sparky would get a chance to be heroic.

programme.title: T.U.F.F. Puppy: Pup Daddy/ Candy Cane-ine
programme.desc: A dim-witted dog is recruited into a super-secret crime-fighting organization.

programme.title: Back at the Barnyard
programme.desc: Otis and his friends have adventures while trying to protect the farm they live on.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius: The Junkman Cometh
programme.desc: Jimmy's robot brother Brobot needs his help when his parents are abducted by the Junkman.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius: Foul Bull/ The Science Fair Affair
programme.desc: During a class trip to a rodeo, Jimmy, Carl and Sheen fall for a cute little cowgirl.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: A Room of One's Own/ Carts and Crafts
programme.desc: Alvin convinces Dave to give him his own room, but soon realizes living alone isn't what it's cracked up to be. When Alvin inadvertently destroys Theodore's bicycle, he enters the boys in contest to win a new bike.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Kiss Conspiracy/ House Guest
programme.desc: Simon is too embarrassed to kiss his co-star in the school play. So in a moment of desperation, he agrees to allow Alvin to switch identities with him. Alvin secretly decides to rent out their house for a Hawaiian home-swap.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: He Said She Said/ Attack of the Zombies
programme.desc: Alvin and Brittany give wildly differing versions of why the fire alarm went off at the school. Convinced a zombie invasion is imminent, Alvin and Theodore attempt to protect their loved ones.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Let Them Eat Crumbs/ Who Ghosts There
programme.desc: Eleanor has prepared a cake for a Bake-Off. But Brittany and Alvin come home and eat the cake without knowing its importance! Later, worried that Dave will move the family to his dream house, the boys make the house seem haunted.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Within the Woods
programme.desc: The team comes to grips with the possibility that Leo won't get better, while things only get worse: a new mutant captures Raph.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: A Foot Too Big
programme.desc: When the turtles encounter Bigfoot, they must protect him from a hunter.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers
programme.desc: The Power Rangers Beast Morphers were created to fight crime in the Morphin Grid.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers
programme.desc: The Power Rangers Beast Morphers were created to fight crime in the Morphin Grid.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Mind Meld/ Nothing But Truffle
programme.desc: Donnie gets more than he bargained for when he 'enhances' his brothers' intelligence. And, Mikey and Meat Sweats become BFFs after a bizarre transformation.

programme.title: Amphibia: Handy Anne/ Fort in the Road
programme.desc: Worried that something bad could happen while they are in Newtopia, Anne decides to disaster-proof the farm. Later, Sprig longs for exotic road trip adventures, but Hop Pop's strict road rules threaten to spoil all of his fun plans.

programme.title: Movie: Gone in 60 Seconds

programme.title: Family Guy: Married With Cancer
programme.desc: Brian meets and quickly falls in love with a woman named Jess, who reveals she has cancer. After she receives devastating news regarding her diagnosis, Brian proposes marriage to her.

programme.title: Family Guy: Dead Dog Walking
programme.desc: Brian's marriage to Jess is not what he envisioned, especially after her miraculous recovery from cancer. At the suggestion of Peter, Brian lets himself go, causing Jess to make a surprising decision.

programme.title: Family Guy: Pal Stewie
programme.desc: To Stewie's surprise, he quickly befriends a boy his age, but is devastated when he realizes he isn't invited to his birthday party. Meanwhile, Peter and Lois attend a self-empowerment seminar.

programme.title: Family Guy: Big Trouble in Little Quahog
programme.desc: After Brian teases Stewie for being small, Stewie invents a shrinking machine that results in both of them shrinking to a microscopic size.

programme.title: Family Guy: Stand by Meg
programme.desc: After Meg saves Stewie from a choking incident, Stewie makes it his personal mission to create a better life for Meg. Meanwhile, Chris is sent to a vocational school.

programme.title: Family Guy: The Griffin Winter Games
programme.desc: To the surprise of all the Griffins, Meg makes the U.S. Olympic team as a biathlete and competes in the Winter Olympics.

programme.title: Family Guy: Con Heiress
programme.desc: Stewie and Brian compete for the inheritance of a wealthy, older heiress. Meanwhile, Peter and Chris battle for Mr. Herbert's affection.

programme.title: Family Guy: Pawtucket Pete

programme.title: Family Guy: Hefty Shades of Gray

programme.title: Family Guy: Baby Stewie

programme.title: Bones: High Treason in the Holiday Season
programme.desc: The team investigates the high-stakes murder of a political journalist who was found dead after recently publishing an article exposing corruption in the NSA. Hodgins' paranoia takes over as the team realizes their every move is being watched.

programme.title: Bones: The Cowboy in the Contest
programme.desc: To solve a murder, Brennan and Booth go undercover at an Old West-style shooting competition, while Angela and Hodgins discuss the future of their family and Cam gets close with photographer Sebastian Kohl.

programme.title: Bones: The Doom in the Boom
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a police officer that sends shockwaves through both the Jeffersonian and FBI teams. Behavioral analyst Leslie Green is assigned to work with Booth on the investigation and lends her professional assessment.

programme.title: Bones: The Death in the Defense
programme.desc: Hodgins is eight weeks into his rehabilitation for his paralysis and forced to navigate life in a wheelchair. Meanwhile, Brennan and Booth investigate the death of a public defender who had multiple defendants from previous cases with motives to kill her.

programme.title: Movie: Star Wars: Episode V - The Empire Strikes Back
programme.desc: Luke seeks out a Jedi master while his friends are relentlessly pursued by Darth Vader.

programme.title: Movie: Star Wars: Episode III - Revenge of the Sith
programme.desc: While war wages across the galaxy, Anakin's fear that Padme will die during childbirth allows him to be swayed by the Dark Side of the Force.

programme.title: Arrow: Honor Thy Father
programme.desc: Oliver sets his sights on taking down Martin Somers, a criminal with ties to the Chinese Triad. Meanwhile, Moira and Walter ask Oliver to take over the company.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: The Asset
programme.desc: Pride and his team join forces with FBI Director Isler after a Russian operative disappears after his navy escort is murdered. Also, Tammy partners with former sleeper agent Eva Azorova to locate the missing operative who Eva has known since childhood.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Dead Man Calling
programme.desc: The NCIS team investigates the copycat murder of an unsolved case from 150 years ago that spawned a legendary New Orleans ghost story.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Viral

programme.title: Movie: Star Wars: Episode I - The Phantom Menace

programme.title: Movie: Star Trek
programme.desc: A Romulan, Nero, travels through time searching for Ambassador Spock. Romulus is destroyed in the future and Nero holds Spock responsible. His vengeance brings him to the time of Kirk and Spock's youth where they are still in Starfleet Academy.

programme.title: Movie: The Matrix
programme.desc: A computer hacker called Neo learns that his entire reality is merely a computer-created illusion. In reality, humans are living batteries used by the machine armies that have taken over the world. Neo is the only person who can save humanity.

programme.title: Movie: Star Trek
programme.desc: A Romulan, Nero, travels through time searching for Ambassador Spock. Romulus is destroyed in the future and Nero holds Spock responsible. His vengeance brings him to the time of Kirk and Spock's youth where they are still in Starfleet Academy.

programme.desc: Charlie thinks he's in heaven when he starts dating Isabella, a wild, sexually uninhibited woman, until Alan points out that she's bringing him much closer to hell. He's unfazed by Alan's warning until Isabella threatens to put a curse on his manhood.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Sleep Tight, Puddin' Pop
programme.desc: Charlie puts himself in a compromising position when he spends a drunken evening with his stalker, Rose. Later, he comes face-to-face with her father, who demands to know what Charlie's intentions are with his daughter.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: That Voodoo That I Do Do
programme.desc: After his overtures toward a ballet teacher are rejected, Charlie will stop at nothing to prove that he can persuade her to go out with him. When he talks Jake into taking her dance class to help his cause, his plan is derailed when Jake falls for her.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Madame and Her Special Friend
programme.desc: Alan strikes up a friendship with Charlie's elderly neighbour, Norma, only to find himself on the defensive as she tries to win his affections. Meanwhile, Charlie tries to dissuade Jake from donating money to a televangelist.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Something Salted and Twisted
programme.desc: Alan has a family dinner to celebrate the publication of a newspaper article that calls him a 'good doctor, neighbour and guy,' but he's crushed when his mother is not impressed. After drowning his sorrow in many drinks, he has a life-changing epiphany.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Santa's Village of the Damned
programme.desc: Alan falls for his cooking class teacher, who quickly moves into the house, fattens the guys up with gourmet meals, drives Berta crazy with housekeeping tips and generally turns all of their lives upside down.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: That Special Tug

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Humiliation Is a Visual Medium

programme.desc: Dorothy must give the eulogy at her brother (a cross dresser), Phil's funeral. Meanwhile, a feud between Sophia and Phil's widow reaches a peak leading Sophia to reveal her hidden feelings about her son's alternative lifestyle.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Older and Wiser

programme.title: Movie: The Last Bridesmaid

programme.title: Movie: Love, Romance and Chocolate
